Our Promise

What We Never Compromise On

Transparency in everything we do.

💉

Zero Injections

No hormonal injections or artificial boosters — ever.

🌿

Natural Feeding

Only fresh grass, natural fodder, and clean water.

💚

Stress-Free Living

Open space, calm environment, gentle handling every day.

👶

Calves Together

Mother and calf are never forcibly separated.

🏛️

Heritage Breeds

Gir, Red Sindhi, Kangayam — native Indian breeds only.

🤝

Ethical Milking

Hand-milked gently, only after the calf has had its share.

Come Meet Them

Want to See Us Live?

Visit Sri Ranga Gaushala — walk the farm, meet the cows that give you pure A2 milk every morning.
